"tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2070"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读51小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":105713,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":184372,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":3909},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7570677826086863640","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很喜欢作者的文，很难得的一篇女本位小说，不管女主是什么样子的，什么立场，什么地位，男主都要站在女主这边，还自觉做小，宽容大度，不会因为女主身边的其他男人闹（小作怡情，这个可以有），没有雌竞，有几篇故事，女生们的感情甚至比男主们更值得珍惜，没专注走剧情，重点在女主和男主们的感情上。我在作者的文里看完了好几个没看过的电视剧，因为没有代餐，所以看完感兴趣的故事后，又看了其他没看过电视剧的故事，写的真的很好很好很好很好，超级超级超级超级喜欢"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1762687976,"group_id":"7213286370482064440","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N23fc+9qY6TycgtOQMGertM=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/70447a78d99542738cec66359119b86c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706703&x-signature=3KPBrBfnj9vCdWghkul9f%2BHdt%2BI%3D","user_id":"382273672717495","user_name":"这里是七七祁"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"382273672717495","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1723993605,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f6
